params.name: CBD
params.description:
On November 3, 1992, the United Nations Conference on Environment and Development adopted the resolution for the Convention on Biological Diversity.
The Convention on Biological Diversity (CBD) is an international agreement aimed at protecting global biodiversity and promoting sustainable ecological development. The convention recognizes biodiversity as the foundation of global ecosystems and human social development, with irreplaceable importance. It outlines measures that contracting partie …
